revision.text:
[[ja:五十嵐神社]] {{Expand Japanese|五十嵐神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Ikarashi Shrine | native_name = 五十嵐神社 | image = Ikarashi Jinja Shrine, Sanjo, Niigata, Japan, April 2021.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Ikarashi Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|37.573908861111114|139.04912713888888}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Ikarashi Shrine'''|五十嵐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Echigo Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Echigo Province|ja|越後国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11636502|1=List of Shikinaisha in Echigo Province}} ** Series ordinal: 35 ** P155: {{ill|Q135040460|ltq=Q135040460|qid=Q135040460|1=Wofuseno Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q135040462|ltq=Q135040462|qid=Q135040462|1=Iyahikono Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Niigata Prefecture|lt=Niigata Prefecture|ace|Prefektur Niigata|af|Niigata-prefektuur|an|Prefectura de Niigata|ar|نييغاتا (محافظة)|azb|نیقاتا اوستانی|az|Niiqata prefekturası|ban|Préféktur Niigata|be|Ніігата (прэфектура)|bg|Ниигата|bn|নিইগাতা প্রশাসনিক অঞ্চল|ca|Prefectura de Niigata|cdo|Niigata-gâing|ceb|Niigata-ken|ce|Ниигата (префектура)|ckb|پارێزگای نیگاتا|cs|Prefektura Niigata|cy|Niigata (talaith)|da|Niigata-præfekturet|de|Präfektur Niigata|devoyage|Niigata (Präfektur)|en|Niigata Prefecture|envoyage|Niigata (prefecture)|eo|Gubernio Nigato|es|Prefectura de Niigata|esvoyage|Prefectura de Niigata|et|Niigata prefektuur|eu|Niigata (prefektura)|fa|استان نیگاتا|fi|Niigatan prefektuuri|frr|Niigata (Prefektüür)|fr|Préfecture de Niigata|frvoyage|Niigata (préfecture)|ga|Maoracht Niigata|gl|Prefectura de Niigata|hak|Niigata-yen|he|ניאיגטה (מחוז)|hr|Niigata (prefektura)|hu|Niigata prefektúra|hy|Նիիգատա (պրեֆեկտուրա)|id|Prefektur Niigata|ilo|Prepektura ti Niigata|it|Prefettura di Niigata|ja|新潟県|jabooks|日本のすがた 地理 都道府県/新潟県|jaquote|新潟県|javoyage|新潟県|jv|Préfèktur Niigata|ka|ნიიგატის პრეფექტურა|km|នីហ្កាតា(ខេត្ត)|kn|ನೀಗತಾ (ಪ್ರಾಂತ್ಯ)|ko|니가타현|la|Niigataënsis|lt|Niigatos prefektūra|lv|Ņiigatas prefektūra|mk|Ниигата (префектура)|mni|ꯅꯤꯏꯒꯥꯇꯥ ꯂꯝꯈꯥꯢ|mr|निगाता प्रांत|ms|Wilayah Niigata|ne|निगाता|nl|Niigata (prefectuur)|nov|Niigata Prefekture|no|Niigata (prefektur)|os|Ниигатæ (префектурæ)|pl|Prefektura Niigata|pnb|ضلع نیایگاٹا|pt|Niigata (prefeitura)|ptvoyage|Niigata (província)|ro|Prefectura Niigata|ru|Ниигата (префектура)|sco|Niigata Prefectur|se|Niigata prefektuvra|sh|Prefektura Niigata|simple|Niigata Prefecture|sk|Niigata (prefektúra)|sr|Префектура Нигата|su|Niigata Prefecture|sv|Niigata prefektur|svvoyage|Niigata (prefektur)|sw|Mkoa wa Niigata|ta|நீகாட்டா|tg|Префектураи Ниигата|th|จังหวัดนีงาตะ|tl|Prepektura ng Niigata|tr|Niigata (prefektörlük)|tt|Ниигата (префектура)|uk|Префектура Ніїґата|ur|نیگاتا پریفیکچر|vi|Niigata|war|Niigata (prefektura)|wuu|新潟县|zh_classical|新潟縣|zh_min_nan|Niigata-koān|zh_yue|新潟縣|zh|新潟县|zhvoyage|新潟縣|qid=Q132705|1=Niigata Prefecture}} * {{ill|Q817273|ltq=Q817273|qid=Q817273|1=Sanjō, Niigata}} * {{ill|Q666514|ltq=Q666514|qid=Q666514|1=Echigo Province}} * {{ill|Kanbara district|lt=Kanbara district|ja|蒲原郡|qid=Q11621281|1=Kanbara district}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|37.573908861111114|139.04912713888888}} * {{coord|37.573956|139.048627}} == image (P18) == * Ikarashi Jinja Shrine, Sanjo, Niigata, Japan, April 2021.jpg == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 182453 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q90139226|ltq=Q90139226|qid=Q90139226|1=Ken-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Shinto Directive|lt=Shinto Directive|en|Shinto Directive|fa|بخشنامه شینتو|fr|Directive shinto|id|Pengarahan Shinto|ja|神道指令|zh|神道指令|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == legal form (P1454) == * {{ill|Q7311343|ltq=Q7311343|qid=Q7311343|1=religious corporation}}https://www.houjin-bangou.nta.go.jp/download/zenken/index.html == architectural style (P149) == * {{ill|Q210684|ltq=Q210684|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} == country (P17) == * Dineʼé Bikéyah|ny|Japan|oc|Japon|olo|Japounii|om|Jaappaan|or|ଜାପାନ|os|Япон|pag|Hapon|pam|Hapon|pap|Hapon|pa|ਜਪਾਨ|pcd|Japon|pcm|Japan|pdc|Japan|pfl|Japan|pl|Japonia|plnews|Kategoria:Japonia|plquote|Japonia|plvoyage|Japonia|pms|Giapon|pnb|جاپان|pnt|Ιαπωνία|ps|جاپان|pt|Japão|ptnews|Categoria:Japão|ptquote|Japão|ptvoyage|Japão|pwn|Dripun|qu|Hapun|rm|Giapun|rmy|Japan|rn|Yapon|roa_rup|Japonia|roa_tara|Giappone|ro|Japonia|ronews|Categorie:Japonia|rovoyage|Japonia|rue|Японія|ru|Япония|runews|Категория:Япония|ruvoyage|Япония|rw|Ubuyapani|sah|Дьоппуон|sat|ᱡᱟᱯᱟᱱ|sa|जपान्|scn|Giappuni|sco|Japan|sc|Giapone|sd|جاپان|se|Jáhpan|sg|Zapöo|shn|မိူင်းၵျႃႇပၢၼ်ႇ|sh|Japan|simple|Japan|si|ජපානය|skr|جاپان|sk|Japonsko|sl|Japonska|smn|Jaapaan|sm|Iapani|sn|Japani|so|Jabaan|sq|Japonia|sqnews|Kategoria:Japoni|srn|Japan|sr|Јапан|srnews|Категорија:Јапан|srquote|Јапан|ss|IJapani|stq|Japan|st|Japane|su|Jepang|sv|Japan|svnews|Kategori:Japan|svvoyage|Japan|sw|Japani|syl|ꠎꠣꠙꠣꠘ|szl|Japůńijo|szy|Zipun|ta|யப்பான்|tanews|பகுப்பு:ஜப்பான்|tay|Gipun|tcy|ಜಪಾನ್|tdd|ᥛᥫᥒᥰ ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == native label (P1705) == * {'text': '五十嵐神社', 'language': 'ja'} == name in kana (P1814) == * いからしじんじゃ == postal code (P281) == * 955-0107https://www.houjin-bangou.nta.go.jp/download/zenken/index.html == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 1110005005800 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Ikarashino Shrine|lt=Ikarashino Shrine|qid=Q135040461|1=Ikarashino Shrine}} ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '新潟県三条市飯田2283', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:五十嵐神社]] {{wikidata link|Q57931939}} == Japanese content == {{Shrine |Name=Ikarashi Shrine |Image=[[File:Ikarashi Jinja Shrine, Sanjo, Niigata, Japan, April 2021.jpg|270px]]
Worship hall |Location={{ill|lt=Niigata Prefecture|Q132705|qid=Q132705|1=Niigata Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Sanjo City|Q817273|qid=Q817273|1=Sanjō, Niigata}} Iida 2283 |Coordinates= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deity={{ill|lt=Ikaruhi Ashihiko no Mikoto|Q11372186|qid=Q11372186|lt=Ikaruhi Obi-hiko no Mikoto|1=Prince Ikatarashihiko}} |Shrine rank={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (minor)
Former {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Prefectural Shrine|1=UNKNOWN}} |Main hall={{ill|lt=Nagare-zukuri|Q210684|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |Annual festival={{ill|lt=May 3|Q2547|qid=Q2547|1=May 3}} |Map= {{Location map|Japan Niigata|label=Ikarashi Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} {{List of coordinates}} '''Ikarashi Shrine''' (いからしじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Iida, {{ill|lt=Sanjo City|Q817273|qid=Q817273|1=Sanjō, Niigata}}, {{ill|lt=Niigata Prefecture|Q132705|qid=Q132705|1=Niigata Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} (minor shrine). Under the {{ill|lt=modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|qid=Q712534|lt=former shrine rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}, it was classified as a prefectural shrine. === Overview === It is identified with the “Ikarashi Shrine” listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} under {{ill|lt=Echigo Province|Q666514|qid=Q666514|1=Echigo Province}}, {{ill|lt=Kanbara District|Q11621281|qid=Q11621281|1=Kanbara district}}. In the early modern period, it was also known as “Wakaichioji” and “Iida Shrine.” The enshrined deity is {{ill|lt=Ikaruhi Ashihiko no Mikoto|Q11372186|qid=Q11372186|lt=Ikaruhi Obi-hiko no Mikoto|1=Prince Ikatarashihiko}}. According to tradition, {{ill|lt=Ikaruhi Ashihiko no Mikoto|Q11372186|qid=Q11372186|lt=Ikaruhi Obi-hiko no Mikoto|1=Prince Ikatarashihiko}} resided in the area of Miyazawa, taught flood control and agricultural techniques, and led the development of the Shimoda region; it is also said that the name of the {{ill|lt=Ikarashi River|Q11372110|qid=Q11372110|1=Ikarashi river}} derives from this. The annual festival is held on {{ill|lt=May 3|Q2547|qid=Q2547|1=May 3}}. As for candidate shrines ({{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō#candidate shrines|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|lt=ronsya|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}) for Ikarashi Shrine, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Yagi Shrine|1=UNKNOWN}} in Kitaiogawa of the same city is also cited, but many theories support this shrine. Today the shrine is located on a hill overlooking the Ikarashi River, but it is presumed that in the medieval period it stood at the {{ill|lt=kimon|Q11673539|qid=Q11673539|1=Kimon}} (northeast, unlucky direction) of the residence of a local powerful clan, the manor of {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ikarashi Kobunji|1=UNKNOWN}}, which was situated at the foot of the hill. Within the shrine grounds is the Shimekake Ōsugi (sacred rope-hung giant cedar), which carries a legend that a huge stone thrown from the garden of Ikarashi Kobunji Yoshitatsu’s residence became embedded in the cedar. It was revered because drinking a decoction made from its bark was believed to ensure safe childbirth. It was designated a {{ill|lt=Natural Monument|Q23790|qid=Q23790|1=Natural monument}} of Niigata Prefecture in {{ill|lt=Shōwa|Q327567|qid=Q327567|1=Shōwa era}} 29 ({{ill|lt=1954|Q18581|qid=Q18581|1=1954}}), but after being damaged by the {{ill|lt=Second Muroto Typhoon|Q1140009|qid=Q1140009|1=Typhoon Nancy (1961)}} in 36 ({{ill|lt=1961|Q3696|qid=Q3696|1=1961}}) and dying, the designation was revoked.{{Citation|Japanese book|title=Kadokawa Dictionary of Japanese Place Names 15|year=1989|pages=126–127|chapter=Ikarashi Shrine|publisher={{ill|lt=Kadokawa Shoten|Q1054765|qid=Q1054765|1=Kadokawa Shoten}}|editor=Editorial Committee of “Kadokawa Dictionary of Japanese Place Names”|isbn=4-04-001150-3}}{{Citation|Japanese book|title=Comprehensive History of Japanese Place Names, Vol. 15|year=1986|page=651|contribution=Ikarashi Shrine|publisher={{ill|lt=Heibonsha|Q11482108|qid=Q11482108|1=Heibonsha}}|isbn=4-582-49015-8}}. === Local information === '''Address''' * 2283 Iida, Sanjo City, Niigata Prefecture '''Access''' *By car ** About 40 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Hokuriku Expressway|Q1549512|qid=Q1549512|1=Hokuriku Expressway}} {{ill|lt=Sanjo-Tsubame Interchange|Q10866197|qid=Q10866197|lt=Sanjo-Tsubame IC|1=Sanjo-Tsubame interchange}} *By bus ** From {{ill|lt=Higashi-Sanjo Station|Q5753817|qid=Q5753817|1=Higashi-Sanjō Station}}, take the {{ill|lt=Echigo Kotsu|Q11636491|qid=Q11636491|1=Echigo Kotsu}} bus bound for “{{ill|lt=Yagigahana|Q65249077|qid=Q65249077|1=Yagigahana}} Onsen,” get off after about 30 minutes at “Shimoda Junior High School-mae,” then walk 20 minutes === Notes === {{Reflist}} === Related items === * {{ill|lt=Shimoda Village (Niigata Prefecture)|Q7499140|qid=Q7499140|1=Shitada, Niigata}} – The area corresponding to the Shimoda region. === External links === * [https://www.city.sanjo.niigata.jp/sanjonavi/see_do/history_culture/jinja_jisha_joshi/2289.html Ikarashi Shrine] – Sanjo City official website * [https://www.pref-lib.niigata.niigata.jp/?page_id=1140 Niigata Prefectural Archives: Niigata Shrine, Temple, and Buddhist Hall Register Search] – View the shrine register submitted by Ikarashi Shrine to Niigata Prefecture. * [https://www.houjin-bangou.nta.go.jp/henkorireki-johoto.html?selHouzinNo=1110005005800 National Tax Agency Corporate Number Publication Site: Ikarashi Shrine] {{Shinto horizontal}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ikarashi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ikarashi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]]
